feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Whichever material has E5 availability check the quantity should not be confirmed in the order even
entry.content:
Whichever material has E5 availability check the quantity should not be confirmed in the order even though the stock is available.

the user wanted to confirm the order orders manually for which are having E5 availability Check

entry.title: ATP check - Cumulative check CO09
entry.content:
Hi,

When I open CO09 I see this picture:

DateMRP elementMRP element dataReq.reqd qtyConfirmedCumulative ATP qty
09.02.2024Stock                                        3000
16.10.2023DelvryTotals record12-120
16.10.2023Delvry00111111/000010/00008-80
16.10.2023Delvry00222222/000050/00004-40
27.10.2023PldOrdTotals record804-
27.10.2023PldOrd123456804-
27.10.2023DelvryTotals record30-304-
27.10.2023Delvry00333333/000010/000015-154-
27.10.2023Delvry00444444/000030/000015-154-

Next I go to VL02N > Delivery 00222222 > choose batch and it gives me the error (VL150): Only 0 of material AAAAA available

Next I go to VL02N > Delivery 00111111 > choose batch and it gives me the error (VL150): Only 4 of material AAAAA available

Next I go to VL02N > Delivery 00333333 > choose batch and it gives me the error (VL150): Only 11 of material AAAAA available

Next I go to VL02N > Delivery 00444444> choose batch and it gives me the error (VL150): Only 11 of material AAAAA available

Question - Could someone help me to understand what is the logic here? I have available stock 30 but I can not proceed any delivery.

In addition, I created Planned order for some quantity on 16.10.2023. And after that I did not have the issues.

Thanks.

entry.title: Standard configuration values in SAP system
entry.content:
Hi All

A frequent question that is laid out is what do we do in terms of standard values that SAP may have provided. Some of the examples are for customer groups or for additional data fields. These values that SAP provides are typically for illustration and may not be used in a customer environment.

The question raised is what do we do with the values that are not planned to be used ? It should be safe to remove the values from the configuration that are not required so that users do not see values that are not supposed to be used. However, if these are to be removed, we also need to ensure that all language dependent description tables are also cleansed as otherwise deleting a value from one language does not remove the values from the text table for other languages. That could be an issue since a deletion of a primary key should also result in the text tables to be updated. 

What does the forum think ? Do we retain standard values that are not required or is it better for user facing drop down values to be removed ? Some system control documents do not expect redundant values in the system as a part of the certification process. 

Would appreciate thoughts from fellow members

entry.title: In my case stock is not available in mmbe but schedule line confirmed quantity and there is no popup
entry.content:
In my case stock is not available and schedule line confirmed quantity also availability check popup was not came for one of the order

Because of that storage location and batch was not determined

Looks like one time prod issue 

Please provide your suggestions

entry.title: Consignment issue order placed with more than unrestricted customer consignment stock
entry.content:
I have created consignment fill-up with 100 qty stock delivered the stock and created proforma invoice.

After that i created 1st consignment issue with reference to proforma for 10 quantity, delivered the same and created invoice. again i created the same issue cycle with 100 qty but the unrestricted customer consignment stock was 90 as i have issued 10 qty before. Still my 2nd issue cycle processed and after that i checked in MB58 there was no stock. Please help. when I process the 2nd issue order there i want the remaining stock only in order quantity, for every issue order it carries the same order quantity which is entered in fill-up proforma invoice.

entry.title: No direct postings possible to G/L accountMessage no. M7059
entry.content:
No direct postings possible to G/L account
Message no. M7059

entry.title: Simulate price on S/4
entry.content:
hello,
I heard that the v_nl transaction was obsolete under S/4.
Is there a transaction that replaces it?
I have to correct a function which simulates prices, but the konV and KNA1 tables are no longer populated. therefore this function can no longer be used.
Do you have any idea what I can look at?


Thanks you
Thierry

entry.title: storage location field greyed out for the delivery item
entry.content:
i am creating a delivery for an item with the sales order BOM.

but in the delivery for the sub items the storage location field is greyed out. and for the same item category and material if i create the delivery when the item is not part of the BOM item it works fine.

any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: Crate service order form repair order
entry.content:
Hello,

I have requirement to create service order from repair order ( transaction VA02  using Repair tab). I can not use BAPI 'BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN'   as there is block for specific order type creation using IW31. Is there any other BAPI to create service order from repair order ?

Thanks !!

entry.title: How can we upload Forecast delivery schedule from excel?
entry.content:
We have some customers w/o EDI connection. We would like to use sales scheduling agreements for them as well, but update the Forecast delivery schedule that they send by mail.

We're on S4HANA 2021. What Fiori app can be used? If none available, which BAPI/FM can be used?

entry.title: How to substract the value of base price with the value of down payment settlement
entry.content:
I have created a sales order with a billing plan, let say the total amount of the sales order is US$1,000,

And then at the billing plan, I create a down payment request US$300, and the closing invoice is U$1,000.

After that I create down payment request billing (VF01), the amount is US$300 + Tax, then the Finance dept post incoming payment for the Down Payment.

After the delivery complete, I create the final billing based on the sales order number. When i checked the total amount, the total amount still US$1,000 + tax. How can I substract the total amount with the Down Payment amount when create the final invoice (billing)?

entry.title: The invoices are not appearing correctly in the e-document cockpit.
entry.content: Hello SAP community! I've configured e-document settings in the public cloud, but unfortunately, my invoices aren't appearing in the e-document cockpit. Could someone kindly provide guidance on troubleshooting this issue?

entry.title: Sales Contract with multiple items and decrement equally
entry.content:
We must create a sales contract with the same material listed multiple times, and each material has a different pricing. This happens because, in the sales contract, the pricing must foresee all possible variations that will occur when the sales orders come in, and other pricing will be applied; here are some samples of possible combinations that would impact the pricing:

Item 10: Material A + Ship-to A + Plant A + Incoterm A = PR00 $1.00 (and several other conditions)

Item 20: Material A + Ship-to B + Plant A + Incoterm A = PR00 $2.00 (and several other conditions)

Item 30: Material A + Ship-to B + Plant B + Incoterm A = PR00 $3.00 (and several other conditions)

Item 40: Material A + Ship-to B + Plant C + Incoterm B = PR00 $4.00 (and several other conditions)

Note that the material is always the same, but the rest of the elements would vary and the pricing will be different, and we can just create a contract with those items.

The problem is when the sales order comes in as it will have the Material A and will falls in one of the contract variations, like item 30 for example, and when this order is shipped, all other items needs to be decremented as well just the like 30 would be. 

Is there any standard way to do it? Decrement all items of the sales contract even if only one of them are referenced to a sales order?

I looked for Assortment Module for the contract WK1, but in our system the WK1 asks to add a material, not an assortment module. 

Any suggestion is appreciated!

entry.title: How to input manual iitem price in apps Create Sales Order
entry.content:
Is there any way to input manual item price when creating sales order through Fiori Create Sales Order apps? With VA01 I can input manual item price, but with create sales order apps, there is no field to input item price.

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Schedule line date changed
entry.content:
Hello,

Can anyone please answer on this?

We have created MTO sales order on 31.01.2024 that time production order was not confirmed so system shows  requested delivery date to 07.02.2024, but very same day night  production order was confirmed and released and on 01.02.2024 GR done, but as per schedule line 07.02.2024 the loading date, transport planning date, material availability date should be 06.02.2024 but when production confirmed Via IT BATCH all the schedule line loading,planning, material availability date changed to 01.02.2024? Can anyone explain why IT BATCH has changed the date when scheduled date is 07.02.2024 and planning date is 06.02.2024 in sales order?

REQUESTED DELIVERY DATE WHEN ORDER NOT CONFIRMED -07.02.2024

LOADING DATE - 06.02.2024

TRANSPORTAION PLANNING DATE - 06.02.2024

MATERIAL AVAILABILITY DATE - 06.02.2024

But via IT BATCH it has automatically changed to 01.02.2024.

entry.title: Internal Subcontracting with quantity payback
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We are currently facing a unique scenario in our Make-To-Order industry and would greatly appreciate your assistance in addressing it.

The situation at hand involves the following steps:

  1. Receipt of Semi-Finished Material for a Customer:

    • How should we appropriately add this material to our inventory?
    • Under which specific case within the SAP system should it be categorized?

  2. Manufacturing Process and Production of Finished Goods:

    • Once we receive the semi-finished material, we will proceed with the manufacturing process to transform it into finished products.

  3. Special Consideration for Revenue Recognition:

    • Upon completion of the manufacturing process, we have a unique arrangement with our customers wherein instead of receiving monetary compensation, we retain a portion of the finished products.
    • Specifically, we retain 10% of the finished products, while delivering the remaining 90% to the customer.
    • It is imperative that we accurately reflect this arrangement within the SAP system to ensure proper tracking and accounting for the retained portion as part of the overall production process.

We kindly seek your expertise in configuring the SAP system to effectively manage and document these steps in accordance with our business requirements.

Your insights and guidance on how to best address these intricacies within the SAP environment would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your valuable assistance.

Best regards,
Mohammed Abbas

entry.title: PU ordered quantity exceeded by 2
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am getting an error "PU ordered quantity exceeded by 2" while GR even though the ordered qty is 2. There is no exceed in qty both order and GR qty is same,  what may be the problem here.

Pls suggest any resolution here.

entry.title: Reprint Sales Contract with updated data
entry.content: Can we re print sales contract output with the updated sales contract data? If there is a miss typed quantity in sales contract and the sales contract already saved, then I want to change the quantity and re print it.

entry.title: Intrastat Intracompany Returns
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I was looking in the Community for a solution today for Intracompany Returns.
Basically the scenario is the following - we return goods from one affiliate plant to another logistics plant located in two different countries within the same company code. We use a return stock transport order.
At the end of the process in the Intrastat report we can see the order in the dispatch section in one of the plants, but don't see the receipt in the receiving plant. (we use movement types 161 and 671 within the process). 
As of what I have read by far, the only recent note I found is 2446786. All the other ones are quite older. We use S4 Hana Version 1709.
However, according this note we should change our process and use regular STO types and not a return.
My question is if someone has found any option to add the STO to the receipt of the receiving plant, or there is no other way than to change the process as suggested in 2446786?

Thank you in advance,
Regards,
Boris

entry.title: VLPODQ
entry.content: VLPODQ，交货单已经过账发货，移动类型是687，但是在VLPODQ界面中做确认时，报错：
